nodes.name: assembled-graph.json
nodes.summary: assembled-graph.json (config, 6454 lines) — Complete assembled knowledge graph merging all batch results. Contains layers (9 layers: bot-application, message-processing, session-and-state, terminal-and-tmux, handlers-and-ui, transcription, testing, documentation, configuration), nodes (269 total across config/document/file/function/class types), edges (375 total across contains/imports/calls/tested_by types), tour (8 steps), and project metadata (name: ccbot, frameworks: python-telegram-bot, languages: python/markdown/toml/yaml/shell, gitCommitHash, analyzedAt).

nodes.name: batch-1.json
nodes.summary: batch-1.json (config, 102 lines) — Batch 1 analysis result. Contains 7 nodes for root-level configuration and documentation files (.env.example, AGENTS.md, CLAUDE.md, README.md, README_CN.md, README_RU.md, pyproject.toml). No edges. These are the first files processed by the batch analyzer.

nodes.name: batch-2.json
nodes.summary: batch-2.json (config, 46 lines) — Batch 2 analysis result. Contains 3 nodes for font license documents (LICENSE-JetBrainsMono.txt, LICENSE-NotoSansMono.txt, LICENSE-Symbola.txt). No edges.

nodes.name: batch-3.json
nodes.summary: batch-3.json (config, 2860 lines) — Batch 3 analysis result. Contains nodes and edges for core source files under src/ccbot/ (__init__.py, bot.py, config.py, handlers/*.py, hook.py, main.py, markdown_v2.py, monitor_state.py, screenshot.py, session.py, session_monitor.py, telegram_sender.py, terminal_parser.py, tmux_manager.py, transcribe.py, transcript_parser.py, utils.py, font file). Includes file, function, and class nodes with contains, imports, and calls edges.

nodes.name: batch-4.json
nodes.summary: batch-4.json (config, 2758 lines) — Batch 4 analysis result. Contains nodes and edges for test files under tests/ccbot/ (conftest.py, test_config.py, test_forward_command.py, test_hook.py, test_markdown_v2.py, test_monitor_state.py, test_session.py, test_session_monitor.py, test_telegram_sender.py, test_terminal_parser.py, test_transcribe.py, test_transcript_parser.py, test_utils.py, handlers/test_interactive_ui.py, handlers/test_response_builder.py, handlers/test_status_polling.py). Includes file and class nodes with contains edges.

nodes.name: batch-5.json
nodes.summary: batch-5.json (config, 85 lines) — Batch 5 analysis result. Contains 4 nodes (tests/conftest.py, tests/integration/test_config_integration.py, tests/integration/test_monitor_state_integration.py, plus class nodes) and 2 contains edges for integration test files.

nodes.name: batches.json
nodes.summary: batches.json (config, 797 lines) — Batch scheduling and export metadata. Schema version 1, louvain algorithm, totalFiles: 63, totalBatches: 5. Contains exportsByPath mapping every source file to its exported functions/classes. Defines all 5 batch definitions with their file lists, import data, and neighbor maps.

nodes.name: fingerprint-input.json
nodes.summary: fingerprint-input.json (config, 68 lines) — Input for structural fingerprinting. Contains projectRoot path, list of all 63 source file paths to fingerprint, and the git commit hash (2f85b4d1). Serves as input to the fingerprint generation process.

nodes.name: fingerprints.json
nodes.summary: fingerprints.json (config, 5101 lines) — Structural fingerprint analysis results for all 63 files. Each file entry includes: contentHash (SHA-256), analyzed functions (name, params, returnType, exported, lineCount), classes (name, methods, properties, exported, lineCount), imports (source module, specifiers), exports list, totalLines, and hasStructuralAnalysis flag. Generated at 2026-07-17T13:56:19.466Z.

nodes.name: import-map.json
nodes.summary: import-map.json (config, 195 lines) — Import dependency map of the entire codebase. Contains stats (filesScanned: 63, filesWithImports: 23, totalEdges: 100) and per-file import lists showing which modules each file depends on. Script completed successfully. Reveals the dependency graph structure of the project.

nodes.name: knowledge-graph.json
nodes.summary: knowledge-graph.json (config, 6454 lines) — Full knowledge graph output. Contains layers (9 layers), nodes (269 total), edges (375 total), tour (8 steps), and project information. Identical structure to assembled-graph.json but represents the canonical knowledge graph generated by the analysis pipeline.

nodes.name: layers.json
nodes.summary: layers.json (config, 57 lines) — Layer definitions for the knowledge graph. Defines 9 layers: bot-application (core setup/config), message-processing (queues/sending/formatting), session-and-state (session lifecycle/monitoring), terminal-and-tmux (tmux management/parsing), handlers-and-ui (telegram handlers/interactive UI), transcription (voice-to-text), testing (unit/integration tests), documentation (readmes/licenses), and configuration (project config files). Each layer maps to file and document node IDs.

nodes.name: meta.json
nodes.summary: meta.json (config, 5 lines) — Analysis metadata. Records lastAnalyzedAt (2026-07-17T15:56:24.944+02:00), version (1.0.0), analyzedFiles count (63), and gitCommitHash (2f85b4d1ed9e922f9a53c42f997310f231bf7b7a). Top-level timestamp and versioning for the entire analysis run.

nodes.name: review.json
nodes.summary: review.json (config, 37 lines) — Codebase review/quality report. Lists 17 orphan nodes (nodes with no edges including .env.example, AGENTS.md, CLAUDE.md, READMEs, LICENSE files, __init__.py files, font file, and tests/conftest.py). Reports stats: 269 total nodes, 375 total edges, 9 layers, 8 tour steps. Node type breakdown: config(2), document(8), file(53), function(132), class(74). Edge type breakdown: contains(206), imports(100), calls(55), tested_by(14).

nodes.name: tour.json
nodes.summary: tour.json (config, 51 lines) — Guided tour of the codebase with 8 steps: (1) Project Overview — bridges Telegram topics to Claude Code sessions via tmux, (2) Entry Point & Configuration — main.py and Config class, (3) Core Bot & Auth — bot.py orchestration and auth.py, (4) Session & State Management — SessionManager/MonitorState/SessionMonitor, (5) Terminal & Tmux Integration — TmuxManager/TerminalParser/TranscriptParser, (6) Message Pipeline & Notifications — queue/sender/response pipeline, (7) Interactive UI & Callback Routing — inline keyboards/callback routing/screenshots, (8) Testing Infrastructure — unit and integration tests.
